ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the UI component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the component's functionality */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Data type of the default value (foreign key referencing component_types) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value assigned to the component property */,
  "since" TEXT /* Version since the component property has been available */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag to mark deprecated components */,
  "deprecation_message" TEXT /* Message explaining the deprecation reason */,
  "deprecation_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_handlers" (
  "handler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event handler */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component associated with the handler */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event that the handler responds to */,
  "handler_function" TEXT /* The actual function that is executed when the event occurs */,
  "description" TEXT /* A description of what the handler does */,
  "execution_order" INTEGER /* Order of execution for the event handler */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("handler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_handlers_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentations" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component related to this documentation */,
  "doc_text" TEXT /* Detailed text of documentation for the component */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the documentation was last updated */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the documentation */,
  "source_link" TEXT /* Link to the source code or reference documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentations_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type (e.g., 'React ref') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type and its purpose */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the parent component type (for inheritance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component related to this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the component */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Description of changes and updates in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "default_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default value entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that this default value belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* The default value assigned to the component property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the default value and its significance */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the default value (e.g., 'string', 'integer', etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_default_values_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that has a dependency */,
  "dependent_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that is being depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., 'optional', 'required') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_dependent_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_dependencies_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component that this tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_tags_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
